episodes.title: Wait, Is This a Cult? Landmark and the Line Between Help and Harm w/ Anne Peterson
episodes.description:
What happens when personal growth crosses the line into manipulation? In this episode, Anne Peterson shares her experience inside Landmark, why she now questions the harm caused by certain high-control groups, and how charisma, coercion, and intensity can get mistaken for transformation.

Today, we are thrilled to have Anne Peterson on the show, author of Is This a Cult? and a coach, consultant, and advocate for safer, more ethical personal and professional development.

In this episode, Anne breaks down Landmark, large group awareness trainings, informed consent, coercive control, and the difference between healthy growth and harmful leadership. She also shares what people should look for in ethical communities, how to spot red flags, and what to do if something feels off.

This conversation is for anyone interested in self-help, leadership, personal development, community, psychology, or the line between support and exploitation.

Timestamps:
[00:00] Trailer
[01:26] Landmark’s Bankruptcy and the Texas Two-Step
[03:51] Is Landmark a Cult?
[04:53] The Origins of EST, Landmark, and Large Group Awareness Trainings
[11:48] “Wait, Is This a Cult?”
[16:27] Peak Experiences, Breakthroughs, and Unintended Harm
[20:07] Why We Miss Manipulation
[24:32] Where Cults Cross the Line
[35:33] The Cost of High-Control Leadership
[37:05] Duty of Care and Ethical Practice
[42:10] Anne’s Work, Book, and Safer Solutions
[45:06] What Healthy Ethical Leadership Looks Like
[48:39] How to Leave a Harmful Group
[52:52] Intuition, Community, and Final Thoughts

Key Takeaways:  
• “Wait, I think I just spent 27 years and became a senior leader and raised a lot of money for a group that is actually a harmful cult, a destructive cult.” ~Anne Peterson
• “We haven’t been trained how to see the exploitive side. We haven’t been trained how to separate charisma from character. We haven’t trained ourselves to see manipulation.” ~Anne Peterson
• “Who paid the price for my signing away and doing that was my daughter and my son who didn’t have their mom.” ~Anne Peterson
• “When the doctor gives me a medication, they have to tell me the side effects. Why? Because in that profession, there’s a standard for informed consent. Why is there not a standard for informed consent in self-help?” ~Anne Peterson
• “If the attention is on you, that’s a great teacher.” ~Anne Peterson
• “If you get a sense like, ooh, something doesn’t seem right here, listen to that.” ~Anne Peterson
